Home › Categories › Boutique Hotels
◆ from €140/night

Boutique Hotels in Berlin

Small, individual, design-driven. Berlin has one of Europe's densest boutique hotel scenes.

Boutique hotels are the chain antidote: 20–80 rooms, all individual, often in period buildings or converted industrial spaces. Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg is the boutique mecca, but Mitte and Prenzlauer Berg also have outstanding houses.

Where to find them

Best districts for boutique hotels

Dietmar Rabich · CC BY-SA 4.0
East 4 hotels

Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg

Alternative, creative, vibrant. Nightlife on the edge, street art on every corner, cafés open late.

East Side Gallery Mercedes-Benz Arena RAW area
H.Helmlechner · CC BY-SA 4.0
Centre 11 hotels

Mitte

Stately, history-rich, urban-elegant. Tourists by day, theatre and fine dining by night.

Brandenburg Gate Museum Island Reichstag
nikey · CC BY-SA 4.0
North 4 hotels

Pankow

Family-friendly, green, relaxed. Cafés with kids' corners, Sundays at Mauerpark, stuccoed period buildings.

Mauerpark Kollwitzplatz Kulturbrauerei

✦

Luxury Hotels

5-star, concierge service, spa, Michelin restaurant. Especially in Mitte and Charlottenburg.

from €280/night hotels
♥

Family Hotels

Children's beds, family rooms, pool, garden. Pankow and Reinickendorf lead.

Budget Hotels

Clean, well-connected, under €80 — Spandau, Marzahn, Neukölln.
